issue_title: Glyph auto-complete shows each glyph twice
issue_body_preview:
![image](https://github.com/Dyalog/ride/assets/10961427/234ac2de-ecab-49e0-b9a8-71738a77f16f)

note the glyph to the far left, and again parenthesised at the end of each line

### Paste the contents of Help → About (Shift+F1)
```
4.5.3929
```
test_description_zh: 在编辑器中触发字形（Glyph）自动补全功能，观察弹出的自动补全列表中每个字形条目的显示内容。
expected_result_zh: 自动补全列表中每个字形条目应仅显示一次对应的字形符号，不应在行末的括号中重复显示该字形。
